title: Advisor Verdict
description: Structured output schema for a single advisor subagent's verdict on a bead or spec. Consumed by phase-3.5 and phase-5.5 orchestrator modules to aggregate advisor feedback.

agent.title: Advisor Agent Name
agent.description: The advisor agent that produced this verdict (e.g. 'architecture-advisor', 'consistency-advisor', 'security-advisor').

verdict.title: Verdict
verdict.description: The advisor's overall assessment. 'clean' means no concerns; 'refinement-needed' means concerns exist that should be addressed; 'escalate' means significant issues that require human intervention.

concerns.title: Concerns
concerns.description: List of issues or gaps the advisor identified. Empty array when verdict is 'clean'.

recommendations.title: Recommendations
recommendations.description: List of suggested refinements or changes to address the concerns. Empty array when verdict is 'clean'.

shapedBeadId.title: Shaped Bead ID
shapedBeadId.description: The bead identifier under review. Optional; omitted when reviewing a spec rather than a specific bead.
